Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
William S. Berland, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Diane Marlene Graham, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Saloman Salvador Assael as follows:
Costs $3312.33
See details of additional judgment on attachment 6(a)(5) of the Judgment.
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.
